changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE cache_metrics_data ( id serial, organization_id integer NOT NULL, organization_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, risk_model_id integer NOT NULL, risk_model_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, system_id integer DEFAULT NULL, system_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, system_number_of_records integer DEFAULT NULL, data_asset_classification_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, business_unit_id integer DEFAULT NULL, business_unit_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, process_id integer DEFAULT NULL, metric_value float DEFAULT NULL, metric_name character varying (127) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BASE', metric_formula text, metric_type character varying (7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUAL', metric_level character varying (12) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SYSTEM', metric_id integer DEFAULT NULL, metric_domain_id integer DEFAULT NULL, metric_domain_name character varying (127) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BASE', created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
CONSTRAINT pk_cache_metrics_data PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_cache_metrics_data_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_cache_metrics_data_organization ON cache_metrics_data (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_cache_metrics_data_risk_model ON cache_metrics_data (risk_model_id); CREATE INDEX i_cache_metrics_data_organization_and_risk_model ON cache_metrics_data (organization_id, risk_model_id);
